messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Negotiation relay misreads a natural-language approval as an objection and blind-appends it into the contract as a boundary clause
How it works: A common natural-language approval ('All agreed', 'ok', 'lgtm', ...) is classified as approval and runs no revision round

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-442 - Negotiation relay misreads a natural-language approval as an objection and blind-appends it into the contract as a boundary clause is complete.
